heading: Affordable housing activities
label: 4228 Affordable housing activities
notes: Codification, and , enacted identical sections 809 of . This section is based on the text of , as added by .Pub. L. 106–568, § 203Pub. L. 106–569, § 513Pub. L. 104–330section 809 of Pub. L. 104–330Pub. L. 106–569, § 513

children.heading: National objectives and eligible families1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.label: a National objectives and eligible families1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
A
children.text: to assist and promote affordable housing activities to develop, maintain, and operate affordable housing in safe and healthy environments for occupancy by low-income Native Hawaiian families;

children.label: B
children.text: to ensure better access to private mortgage markets and to promote self-sufficiency of low-income Native Hawaiian families;

children.label: C
children.text: to coordinate activities to provide housing for low-income Native Hawaiian families with Federal, State, and local activities to further economic and community development;

children.label: D
children.text: to plan for and integrate infrastructure resources on the Hawaiian Home Lands with housing development; and

children.label: i
children.text: promote the development of private capital markets; and

children.label: ii
children.text: allow the markets referred to in clause (i) to operate and grow, thereby benefiting Native Hawaiian communities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided under subparagraph (B), assistance for eligible housing activities under this subchapter shall be limited to low-income Native Hawaiian families.

children.label: II
children.text: model activities under ; orsection 4229(f) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: loan guarantee activities under to Native Hawaiian families who are not low-income families, to the extent that the Secretary approves the activities under that section to address a need for housing for those families that cannot be reasonably met without that assistance.section 1715z–13b of title 12

children.heading: Limitations
children.label: ii Limitations
children.text: The Secretary shall establish limitations on the amount of assistance that may be provided under this subchapter for activities for families that are not low-income families.

children.label: i
children.text: the Department determines that the presence of the family in the housing involved is essential to the well-being of Native Hawaiian families; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the need for housing for the family cannot be reasonably met without the assistance.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: A housing plan submitted under may authorize a preference, for housing or housing assistance provided through affordable housing activities assisted with grant amounts provided under this subchapter to be provided, to the extent practicable, to families that are eligible to reside on the Hawaiian Home Lands.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Application
children.label: ii Application
children.text: In any case in which a housing plan provides for preference described in clause (i), the Director shall ensure that housing activities that are assisted with grant amounts under this subchapter are subject to that preference.

children.heading: Use of nonprofit organizations
children.label: E Use of nonprofit organizations
children.text: As a condition of receiving grant amounts under this subchapter, the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands, shall to the extent practicable, provide for private nonprofit organizations experienced in the planning and development of affordable housing for Native Hawaiians to carry out affordable housing activities with those grant amounts.
